project.name: HI B2B client
project.description: Example client implementations of Healthcare Identifiers (HI) service

bannedDependencies.message: Use Eclipse EE4J jaxws-rt, not legacy Metro / javax JAX-WS.

requireFilesExist.message: This build requires the licensed HI WSDL/XSD tree under hi.wsdl.tree.root (directory containing wsdl/ and schema/). Resolution order: -Dhi.wsdl.tree.root, env HI_WSDL_TREE_ROOT, hi.wsdl.tree.root from an active Maven user-settings profile, else default ${project.basedir}/wsdls/xml. (HI_WSDL_ARTIFACT_ROOT is runtime-only.) Use -Phi-wsdl-artifact to skip wsimport and use hi-wsdl-java instead.

scripts.script: def bd = project.build.directory as File def out = new File(bd, 'generated-sources/wsimport') out.mkdirs() def base = new File(bd, 'generated-sources/wsimport-parts') def names = [ 'wsimport-consumer-search-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-search-ihi-batch-sync', 'wsimport-provider-batch-async-individual', 'wsimport-provider-batch-async-organisation', 'wsimport-provider-search-individual', 'wsimport-provider-search-organisation', 'wsimport-provider-manage-org', 'wsimport-provider-manage-directory-entry', 'wsimport-provider-hpio-directory', 'wsimport-provider-read-reference-data', 'wsimport-provider-read-org', 'wsimport-provider-manage-admin-individual', 'wsimport-provider-read-admin-individual', 'wsimport-provider-hpii-directory', 'wsimport-consumer-search-ihi-batch-async', 'wsimport-consumer-create-provisional-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-merge-provisional-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-update-provisional-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-create-unverified-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-resolve-provisional-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-notify-duplicate-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-notify-replica-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-update-ihi', 'wsimport-consumer-create-verified-ihi', 'wsimport-provider-manage-tds-provider-individual', 'wsimport-provider-search-tds-provider-individual' ] names.each { String part -> def dir = new File(base, part) if (!dir.isDirectory()) return dir.eachFileRecurse(groovy.io.FileType.FILES) { File f -> def rel = dir.toPath().relativize(f.toPath()).toString().replace('\\', '/') def target = new File(out, rel) target.parentFile.mkdirs() if (!target.exists()) { f.withInputStream { ins -> target.withOutputStream { os -> os << ins } } } } } project.getCompileSourceRoots().findAll { String p -> p.contains('wsimport-parts') }.each { project.removeCompileSourceRoot(it) } if (base.isDirectory()) { base.deleteDir() }
